attributes.additional_details: We want to feel safe on our streets. Us women don't want to have to worry that our rights may be stripped to support others religious beliefs. We want the uk not to be to crowed. We want to be and feel respected. We want crimes to drop again. We want children to stop learning that this nonsense is ok. We want England to be England again. Its good to be diverse, but not so much that its turns our country to a 3rd world country. Listen to the people that have fought for england, hear their voices.
attributes.background: We want our country back. We want anyone who's illegally here, and has not been her for at least 10 years to go back to their home. We want safety on the streets of London. We want freedom of speech and of faith in Christ. No more protests, just peace and quiet. For the Uk to be more like Poland.

rejection.details:
Invoke Article 15 of the ECHR- to help tackle illegal migration
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/748972
